title: Better Create+
description: This Modpack lets you play Create with big Improvements in terms of performance and smaller enhancements in terms of the visual experience.
body:
This modpack offers an improved Create survival experience, combining the ingenuity of the Create mod with a selection of visual, functional, and performance improvements. It aims to preserve the essence of vanilla Minecraft while expanding its possibilities in a balanced and seamless way.

Designed primarily for survival gameplay and multiplayer servers, this pack includes carefully chosen mods that fix existing bugs and introduce subtle quality-of-life features. These additions are intended to complement, not overhaul, the vanilla experience.

Players can enjoy practical improvements such as backpacks, a broader range of decorative blocks and enhanced sound design for greater immersion. High-quality performance mods ensure smooth gameplay even under the heavy computational load of Create’s mechanical systems.

To enrich exploration, the modpack also features enhancements in world- and structure generation; notably Terralith, Amplified Nether an some of Yungs less drasic structure enhancements adding variety and depth to both the Overworld and the Nether.

In summary, this modpack enhances the survival experience through the power of the Create mod, offering a visually polished, stable and immersive survival experience without straying too far from the spirit of vanilla Minecraft.
